title: dactylis glauca
intro: Dactylis glauca, also known as rough meadow grass or cock's foot, is a perennial grass native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Dactylis glauca include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Dactylis glauca can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
